title: Debug: Guest checkout crash
body: Debugging the guest checkout crash. The test_guest_checkout fails with NullPointerException in validate_input() at line 42. Investigation reveals that for guest users, user_id is None. The validate_input() function doesn't handle the case where user_id is None for guests, causing the crash. Need to add a null check before accessing user_id fields.

title: Performance investigation: checkout latency
body: Checkout latency increased after recent deploy. Profiling shows database query time spiked. Need to add index on order_id column in transactions table.

title: Meeting notes: sprint planning
body: Sprint planning for sprint 45. Prioritized guest checkout bug fix, payment gateway integration improvements, and cart API refactoring. Assigned tasks T-1001, T-1002, T-1003.
